text:
There was a squirrel that loved chocolate chip cookies. Every day, the squirrel gathered acorns and nuts, searching high and low for chocolate chip cookies. It would visit the kitchen several times a day imagining what cookies it might find. It never thought it would actually find some.

One day, after going for too many hours, the squirrel found a cookie stash hidden in the pantry. It ran around gleefully and ate as many as it could before climbing into its tree sanctuary.

From that day forward, the squirrel ate chocolate chip cookies exclusively. Every evening, it dreamt of cookie crumbs. It stopped gathering acorns and nuts altogether—they weren't chocolate chips. But the dreams satisfied its sweet tooth. Eventually, the squirrel passed away peacefully at the top of its favorite oak tree. Its last thought? A warm, chocolate chip cookie.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
